arts.ttl: 'I liked it' - Ruben Amorim praises Alejandro Garnacho for responding to Manchester United shock
arts.sum: Man Utd play Tottenham in the Carabao Cup tonight and Amorim explained his team selection ahead of the match.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains Marcus Rashford absence as Manchester United forward misses Tottenham clash
arts.sum: The 27-year-old gave an interview on Tuesday saying he is ready for a ‘new challenge’ and is not in the squad for the Carabao Cup quarter-final

arts.ttl: Carabao Cup semi-final draw LIVE: Liverpool, Arsenal, Newcastle await fate after Tottenham v Manchester United
arts.sum: The semi-final draw will follow the remaining quarter-final between Tottenham and Manchester United

arts.ttl: Man Utd slash stewards' £100 bonus in latest costcutting measures
arts.sum: A former Manchester United steward has revealed that Sir Jim Ratcliffe's costcutting exercises have caused him and many other long-serving employees to quit the club

arts.ttl: 'Certainly': Celtic player who Ange Postecoglou knows well could sign for Tottenham in January – journalist
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has a history of signing players he knows well. The Australian signed a number of J-League players during his time at Celtic, and...

arts.ttl: Report: £30m player actually walked away from talks with Manchester City in favour of Tottenham
Former Man United star Nani reunites with old boss Sir Alex Ferguson as they enjoy breakfast together in Portugal
arts.sum: Former Manchester United star Nani reunited with old manager Sir Alex Ferguson for a picturesque breakfast in Portugal.

arts.ttl: Why Marcus Rashford and Jadon Sancho could learn a thing or two from Harry Maguire and his old-school attitude, writes IAN LADYMAN
arts.sum: IAN LADYMAN: Once an £80m defender also courted by Manchester City at the time United bought him from Leicester, Maguire lost his form, his confidence and the Old Trafford captaincy.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Man Utd LIVE: Carabao Cup team news and line-ups as Marcus Rashford not in squad
arts.sum: Spurs and United will be desperate to reach the semi-finals in what has been a disappointing season so far for both

arts.ttl: 'Petty' Ratcliffe SLAMMED for £50 cuts for stewards at Man Utd
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe has continued his cost-cutting measures at Manchester United after it was revealed that cash prizes and bonuses to stewards, worth up to £150, have been scrapped And i report that stewards at Old Trafford – some of the club’s lowest-paid members of staff – have also seen cuts this season such as the scrapping of a £100 bonus for every 10 matches.
